hero.name: Andreas Gabel
hero.title: Datamatiker · IT Operations · Developer
hero.tagline: Building real applications, not just descriptions. Every project on this site is live and interactive.

about.heading: About Me
about.p1: I'm a 4th semester Computer Science (Datamatiker) student at KEA in Copenhagen, with a passion for building software that solves real problems.
about.p2: I currently work in IT Operations at Københavns Kommune, focusing on Linux server administration, automation, and municipal IT infrastructure.
about.p3: This portfolio is more than a list of projects — every application you see here is running live on a single server, containerized with Docker, routed through Nginx, and deployed via CI/CD pipelines. The infrastructure itself is part of the portfolio.

items.title: IT Operations
items.description: Linux server administration, automation, and infrastructure management for municipal IT systems.

items.title: Computer Science (Datamatiker)
items.org: KEA — Copenhagen School of Design and Technology
items.description: Full-stack development with Java, Spring Boot, databases, and software architecture. Currently in 4th semester.

items.title: Teacher — Special Needs Education
items.description: Taught science and religious studies to students with autism. Liaison between municipal agencies and the school, ensuring the best learning environment for young people with extra challenges.

items.title: Theology
items.org: University of Copenhagen — Faculty of Theology
items.description: Studied theology. Active member of the board of 'Teobar' and 'Teologisk Vandrelaug'.

items.title: Naval Officer Cadet
items.description: Training in leadership, navigation, meteorology, ship manoeuvring, and maritime law. Completed sergeant education and was appointed sergeant. Responsible for voyage planning and participated in multiple voyages at sea.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.text: Interested in working together or just want to say hello? Feel free to reach out.
